member.name: T:SwiftCollections.Query.SwiftFixedBVH`1
member.summary: Represents a fixed-point Bounding Volume Hierarchy (BVH) optimized for spatial queries.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.SwiftFixedBVH`1.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified capacity.

member.name: T:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume
member.summary: Represents an axis-aligned bounding box (AABB) in 3D space using fixed-point math.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.#ctor(FixedMathSharp.Vector3d,FixedMathSharp.Vector3d)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The minimum point of the volume.
The maximum point of the volume.

member.name: P:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.Min
member.summary: Gets the minimum point of the bounding volume.

member.name: P:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.Max
member.summary: Gets the maximum point of the bounding volume.

member.name: P:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.Center
member.summary: Gets the center point of the bounding volume.

member.name: P:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.Size
member.summary: Gets the axis-aligned size of the bounding volume.

member.name: P:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.Volume
member.summary: Gets the volume of the bounding box.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.Union(SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume)
member.summary: Creates a new volume that represents the union of this volume and the specified volume.
member.remarks: The resulting volume is the smallest axis-aligned bounding box that fully contains both input volumes.
member.param: The volume to combine with this volume. The resulting volume will encompass both this volume and the specified volume.
member.returns: A new FixedBoundVolume that contains both this volume and the specified volume.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.Intersects(SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume)
member.summary: Determines whether this volume intersects with the specified volume.
member.param: The volume to test for intersection with this volume.
member.returns: true if the volumes intersect; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.GetCost(SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume)
member.summary: Calculates the additional volume required to expand the current volume to fully contain the specified volume.
member.param: The volume to be encompassed by the current volume.
member.returns: The minimum additional volume needed to contain the specified volume. Returns 0 if the current volume already contains the specified volume.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.BoundsEquals(SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume)
member.summary: Determines whether the bounds of this volume are equal to those of the specified volume.
member.param: A to compare with the current volume.
member.returns: true if both the minimum and maximum bounds of the volumes are equal; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.op_Equality(SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume,SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume)
member.summary: Determines whether two BoundVolume instances are equal.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.op_Inequality(SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume,SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume)
member.summary: Determines whether two BoundVolume instances are not equal.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string that represents the current object, including the minimum and maximum values.
member.returns: A string in the format "Min: {Min}, Max: {Max}" that displays the minimum and maximum values of the object.

member.name: T:SwiftCollections.Query.SwiftFixedOctree`1
member.summary: Represents a fixed-point octree optimized for deterministic hierarchical spatial queries.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.SwiftFixedOctree`1.#ctor(SwiftCollections.Query.FixedBoundVolume,SwiftCollections.Query.SwiftOctreeOptions,FixedMathSharp.Fixed64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The immutable world bounds covered by the octree.
The minimum child-node axis length allowed for fixed-point subdivision.

member.name: T:SwiftCollections.Query.SwiftFixedSpatialHash`1
member.summary: Represents a fixed-point spatial hash optimized for deterministic broad-phase spatial queries.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.SwiftFixedSpatialHash`1.#ctor(System.Int32,FixedMathSharp.Fixed64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified capacity and cell size.

member.name: M:SwiftCollections.Query.SwiftFixedSpatialHash`1.#ctor(System.Int32,FixedMathSharp.Fixed64,SwiftCollections.Query.SwiftSpatialHashOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified capacity, cell size, and options.
